final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic movie poster reimagining of 大话西游 (A Chinese Odyssey) in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography aesthetic, 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster art in the spirit of Wong Kar-wai and Jeff Lau, heavy film grain, faded analog color grading, photorealistic
Composition: wide cinematic frame, foreground couple centered and dominant, two distant figures silhouetted against the background, layered depth of field suggesting scale and separation
Subject: 至尊宝 and 紫霞 locked in a passionate embrace and kiss against a crumbling ancient city wall in the foreground; 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing apart from each other in the far background, small and solitary
Scene/backdrop: ancient stone city wall at dusk or golden hour, weathered brick texture, open sky behind the distant figures
Lighting/mood: warm amber and dusty rose tones for the foreground couple, hazy backlight creating a romantic yet melancholic glow, soft lens flare, bittersweet and nostalgic mood
Color palette: warm golden amber as dominant tone, muted dusty rose and terracotta as secondary, desaturated cool teal in the far background to separate distance
Materials/textures: heavy visible film grain throughout, worn stone wall surface, slight color bleed and halation around highlights typical of 1990s Hong Kong film stock
Avoid: digital sharpness, CGI gloss, modern poster typography, oversaturated colors, clean edges, contemporary compositing look
